productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Brown Casual Sandals
description: When your heart desires the utmost style and comfort, there is no better choice than these leather sandals from lee cooper which offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. Team them with jeans or chinos for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look great! Upper Over-the-foot, wide, full-grain leather straps for added durability and style Thread detailing for added structure and style Velcro closure for added comfort Branding on the mid-foot Mid-sole Well cushioned nu-buck foot-bed stitched to the out-sole for durability Out-sole Lightweight, slip-resistant TPU out-sole for better shock absorption Multi-directional lugs all over the out-sole for better grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
